name: Italian Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 can 14 oz. plum tomatoes, broken up
1/2 cup Marsala wine or beef broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a 4 to 5 quart ovenproof pot over medium heat.
2. Pat the meat dry with paper towels and add it to the hot oil along with all of the vegetables and garlic.
3. Brown the meat on all sides, stirring occasionally.
4. Add liquids and seasonings.
5. Cover tightly and bake for 2 1/2 to 3 hours in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until the meat is fork tender.
6. Lift the meat to a cutting board.
7. Cover loosely with foil and let stand for 10 to 15 minutes before slicing.
8. Discard any bay leaves and citrus peel, then skim the fat from the sauce.
9. If desired, thicken the sauce by stirring in 3 tablespoons flour mixed with 1/4 cup water.
